children.text:
By starting the Spiritual Adoption, you are making a commitment of daily prayer for the unborn child.You can also add your voluntary sacrifice i.e. fasting, a renouncement, a deed of mercy. Helping an expectant or single mother is a significant and precious deed. If there is noone like this in your community, you can help through the Tiny Feet Foundation supporting these women who withdrew from abortion and gave birth to their children.
You can donate as little as 10PLN to cover the cost od 20 diapers for the children saved from abortion.

Donate to the Tiny Feet Foundation:
domestic bank transfers, account number:
13 2030 0045 1110 0000 0231 0120

international bank transfers:
SWIFT (BIC): GOPZPLPW
IBAN: PL 13 2030 0045 1110 0000 0231 0120

Tiny Feet Foundation
Pl. Matki Teresy z Kalkuty 5
71–622 Szczecin
Title: DONATION
